sfDiffs.newValue: 24.02 RR back, Adriana to set up meeting with Nathan and Fiona to discuss final steps + Partner choice

narrativeUpdates.oppSummary: Whittard of Chelsea is a UK-based Food & Beverage retailer migrating from SFCC Site Genesis to Shopify Plus, ~$310K projected billed revenue ($714,900 over 3yr). Merchant intent upgraded to 'Committed'. Target September 2026 launch with contract signing by March 20, 2026. Agency (Lime Sharp) selected, payment rates agreed at 0.8% domestic, Global-e confirmed for international. Deal Craft at 80% probability.
narrativeUpdates.whyShopify: Mobile-native architecture directly addresses core pain. Shop Pay — projected 5% revenue uplift presented and well-received by Fiona. Unified Plus offering with future POS potential. Competitive 0.8% domestic payment rate secured via rate review. Global-e confirmed compatible as secondary checkout for international/importer-of-record needs. Fiona emphasized this is 'not just about replatforming' but a full brand and digital strategy transformation — retail managers are excited about the omnichannel implications.
narrativeUpdates.whyNow: Site Genesis EOL. Fiona has set a hard personal deadline of March 20, 2026 for signing both Shopify and Lime Sharp contracts. New agency (Lime Sharp) needs Shopify access by April to hit September 2026 launch. Salesforce contract runs until Feb 2027, creating dual-cost pressure during build period (April-September). Shopify Q1 end-of-quarter (March 31) adds mutual urgency. Fiona confirmed on call: 'We've got to get these things done.'
narrativeUpdates.supportNeeded: 1) Platform credit/concession exploration — Fiona raised concern about paying $2,300/mo Shopify flat fee alongside Salesforce contract through Feb 2027; Adriana committed to seeking concessions from leadership. 2) Contract delivery — Adriana to send rate review document, letter of intent, and contract drafts to Nathan (signing authority) ASAP. 3) Lime Sharp coordination — Adriana to connect with Lime Sharp to ensure aligned on timeline and Shopify access from April. 4) POS roadmap discussion (still outstanding). 5) Subscription/loyalty migration planning (still outstanding).

newCallData.title: Rate Review Results & next Steps - Whittard <> Shopify
newCallData.summary: Critical commercial call: Shopify rate review presented and accepted (0.8% domestic, 5% Shop Pay uplift projected). Fiona set March 20 contract signing deadline. Agency decision finalized (Lime Sharp). Nathan Smith confirmed as contract signer. Global-e compatibility confirmed. One open item: Adriana pursuing platform credits to offset $2,300/mo during build period while Salesforce contract runs through Feb 2027.

updates.notes: Nathan Smith confirmed as signing authority. External lawyers pre-engaged and 'warmed up'. Fiona outlined clear procurement process.
Fiona indicated no problems expected, Shopify contracts 'fairly standard'. External lawyers engaged but actual redline risk is low.
March 20, 2026 target for signature. Fiona: 'I've set myself the 20th of March is my deadline.'
Rate review completed. Contract drafts not yet sent but ready. Letter of intent to follow.
March 20, 2026 target for signature explicitly stated by Fiona.
Nathan Smith confirmed as signing authority (CEO). CFO unavailable so Nathan signs.
Fiona: 'Nathan will probably do the signing.' Contract signer identified.
Buying committee: Fiona (driver), Nathan (signer/CEO), external lawyers, Lime Sharp (agency).
Fiona: March 20 deadline. Lime Sharp needs access April. September launch target.
Fiona Scott: driving timeline, managing stakeholders, presenting internally with excitement, proactively removing blockers.

dealRisks.risk: Contract delivery delay — contracts not yet sent as of March 2, need to reach Nathan before March 20 deadline
Dual-cost period concern — $2,300/mo Shopify platform fee alongside Salesforce contract through Feb 2027; concessions being sought but not confirmed
Nathan engagement gap — signer identified but indirect access only (via Fiona); no direct Shopify-Nathan relationship established

newMAPItems.milestone: Contract drafts + LOI sent to Nathan
